The Sun is conjunct Jupiter and has Saturn next to him in Pisces. So,
tiv issues will suffer slightly but they will all come up well (Jupiter-Saturn
exchange). He will live upto the good old age of78. Saturn in Taurus in the
second round will give ownership of some lands. When he transits Gemini,
much profit will accrue from wife (aspect from Venus). When transiting
Virgo he will give name and fame to the native and he will earn in plenty. So,
the native will live a happy peaceful life in a luxurious manner. Saturn's
placement in second to the Sun indicates some health troubles like wind and
heat (fever etc.).
